---
title: "Kontakt"
title-block-banner: ../images/kontakt.jpg # keine pngs
title-block-banner-color: black 
format-links: [html]   # Link-Namen müssen den Formatkeys entsprechen
format:
  html: { toc: true, toc-depth: 2, code-fold: true, number-sections: false }
---


> **Geographiedidaktik mit dem Schwerpunkt Physische Geographie**
>
> Gronewaldstr. 2
>
> 50931 Köln
>
> Raum 1.123


```{=html}
<a href="#" id="mail-link-ammoneir">Mail an: Jun.-Prof. Rieke Ammoneit</a>

<script>
(function () {
  const user = "rammoneit";
  const domain = "uni-koeln";
  const tld = "de";
  const subject = "Anfrage Schülerlabor-2026";

  const link = document.getElementById("mail-link-ammoneir");

  link.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    window.location.href =
      "mailto:" + user + "@" + domain + "." + tld +
      "?subject=" + encodeURIComponent(subject);
  });
})();
</script>

```
